title: helianthemum glaucum
intro: Helianthemum glaucum, also known as Frostweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Cistaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum glaucum include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting respiratory health and wound healing. The herbal preparations of Frostweed can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy in natural medicine.
